title: Account settings
invalidEmail: The contact email address doesn't look valid. Check the format (e.g. name@domain.com).

profile.heading: 👤 Distributor profile
profile.appearsInEmails: Shown in emails sent to clients
profile.signaturePlaceholder:
Warm regards,
Maria Popescu
Independent Young Living Brand Partner
profile.signatureHint: Shown at the end of emails sent to clients (offer and follow-up). Leave empty for the standard message.
profile.followupDaysHint: days — affects when contacts reappear in the Dashboard Agenda if they haven't received an offer within this interval

focus.title: 🌿 Daily Focus Email
focus.desc: Every morning you receive by email the contacts worth your attention today. If there's nothing to do, you get nothing.
focus.testHint: Sends the Daily Focus email to your login address right away, so you can see how it looks (ignores the chosen time).
focus.testSent: I've sent you a test by email. Check your inbox.
focus.testFailed: Sending failed. Check your email configuration.
focus.testNoContacts: You have no contacts that need attention today, so nothing was sent (this is normal).
focus.testError: Couldn't run the test. Please try again.

account.heading: 🔐 Account
account.emailsOptedOut: You unsubscribed from account and subscription emails. You'll still receive essential emails (e.g. payment receipts).
account.reactivated: Done — you'll receive account and subscription emails again.

subscription.heading: 💳 Subscription
subscription.thanksActive: Thank you! Your subscription is active.
subscription.freeDesc: Access granted by the team, no payment.
subscription.pastDue: Payment failed — update your payment method.
subscription.launchCode: Have a launch code? Enter it below, in the "Got a code?" field.

data.heading: 📦 Your data
data.desc: Download a copy of your data anytime.

email.heading: ✉️ Change email address
email.sent: We sent a confirmation email to your new address. Click the link inside to finish the change. Until then, your account keeps the old address.
email.same: The new address is the same as the current one.
email.changeError: Couldn't change your email. Please try again.

password.heading: 🔑 Change password
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
password.changeError: Error changing the password. Please try again.

danger.heading: ⚠️ Danger zone
danger.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
danger.deleteDesc: All your contacts, offers, resources and data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. (Invoices are kept as required by accounting law.)
danger.deleteFinalConfirm: Are you absolutely sure? All your data will be permanently deleted.
danger.deleteError: Couldn't delete the account. Please try again or contact us.
